scope.baseline: uniform legal copy length and uniform legal source address per event
components_tested: copy_length decoder_max_possible default plus adaptive exception length
copy_source previous-source-plus-length default plus adaptive exception source
scope.declaration_bits_excluded_from_holdout: Holdout rows test stream prediction only; declaration charges are fixed global model costs and are not relearned per split.
scope.train_count_freezing: Frozen rows use the returned adaptive counts learned on train books, then score test books without updating those counts.
